error.bot_token_missing: TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN is not configured. Obtain from BotFather and store in Vault.
error.chat_id_missing: chat_id is missing. Provide chatId in input or set TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID in Vault.

bruteForceAlert.label: Login brute-force alert
bruteForceAlert.description: When 5 consecutive login failures trigger a 60-second lock, an alert is sent to Telegram immediately. Both TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN and TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID must be registered for delivery. When OFF (default), no alert is sent.
